workflow: Pendentive (sail) vault: cells from the Pendentive Vault Voussoirs component (D5F10013) carved from ETH1100 rubble (best-of-candidates match + CGAL trim)
vault: pendentive dome / sail vault (sphere over square)
cell_source: Pendentive Vault Voussoirs component (Frahan > Voussoir, GUID D5F10013)
match: best of 6 ETH1100 candidate stones per cell, scaled to 1.6x cell diagonal, centroid-aligned
fix_2026_06_07: Every voussoir is now either a CGAL-trimmed rubble stone (bounded by its cell) or the CLEAN cut cell. The earlier version kept raw un-trimmed boulders on failed trims (the reported bug). 36/36 are real rubble trims here; 0 raw boulders.
note: sphere-over-square pendentive dome tessellated by lines of curvature (Pendentive Vault Voussoirs component); each cell CGAL-trimmed to a matched ETH boulder posed over it; clean cut-cell fallback (never the raw stone)
